title: Implement WebSearch, WebFetch, and LSP tools
purpose: Implement web tools (OpenAI server-side search for Codex models, HTML-to-markdown fetch) and LSP tool (hover, definitions, references, diagnostics). Reference: crates/norn/reference/jcode/websearch.rs, webfetch.rs.
task: Implement WebSearchTool that delegates to OpenAI server-side search when available and falls back to DuckDuckGo HTML scraping (from jcode reference). Implement WebFetchTool that fetches URLs and converts HTML to markdown. Implement LspTool providing hover, go-to-definition, find references, document symbols, and diagnostics. Testing: Layer 1 unit tests.

requirements.title: Implement WebSearch tool — OpenAI server-side
requirements.spec: WebSearch tool SHALL support OpenAI server-side web search by including a web_search_preview tool in the provider request. The tool acts as a pass-through — the provider handles the actual search.
acceptance: WebSearchTool implements Tool with name 'web_search', effect Network
Input schema: { query: String, num_results: Option<u32> }
When the provider supports server-side search, the tool registers web_search_preview in the tool definitions
Results are returned as the provider's search output

requirements.title: Implement WebSearch tool — DuckDuckGo fallback
requirements.spec: WHEN server-side search is unavailable, WebSearch SHALL fall back to DuckDuckGo HTML scraping. Pattern from reference/jcode/websearch.rs.
acceptance: Fallback queries https://html.duckduckgo.com/html/?q=<query>
Parses result titles, URLs, and snippets from HTML
Returns formatted results as numbered list
Default num_results is 8, max 20

requirements.title: Implement WebFetch tool
requirements.spec: WebFetch tool SHALL fetch a URL and convert HTML content to markdown. Pattern from reference/jcode/webfetch.rs.
acceptance: WebFetchTool implements Tool with name 'web_fetch', effect Network
Input schema: { url: String, format: Option<String>, timeout: Option<u64> }
Formats: 'markdown' (default), 'text', 'html'
HTML-to-markdown conversion handles headings, links, lists, code blocks
Max content size 5MB with streaming body read
Timeout default 30s, max 120s

requirements.title: Implement LSP tool
requirements.spec: LSP tool SHALL provide hover, go-to-definition, find references, document symbols, and diagnostics by delegating to an LSP client connection.
acceptance: LspTool implements Tool with name 'lsp', effect ReadOnly
Input schema: { action: String, path: String, line: Option<u32>, column: Option<u32>, symbol: Option<String> }
Actions: 'hover', 'definition', 'references', 'symbols', 'diagnostics'
Each action returns structured output with file locations and content
Returns clear error when no LSP server is connected

requirements.title: Add web and LSP dependencies
requirements.spec: Cargo.toml SHALL add reqwest (if not already present), regex for HTML parsing, and any LSP client crate needed.
acceptance: Cargo.toml includes reqwest with stream feature
Cargo.toml includes regex for HTML parsing
cargo check -p norn succeeds

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement LSP server management (starting/stopping servers) — only the client tool interface
SHALL NOT implement web scraping beyond HTML-to-markdown conversion
verification: cargo test -p norn — web and LSP tests pass
WebFetch converts a sample HTML string to markdown correctly
LSP tool returns structured output for each action type
